summary: Tested iteration 211 — Assign category to operator UI (Super Admin Operators page) + restaurant cuisine_type extension. All 5 backend pytest tests PASS. Frontend Categories tab + chip-toggle + persistence + Edit-modal Service Categories section all verified working through Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: OperatorCategoriesPage.jsx (lines 94-119) duplicates the entire Tabs/TabsList block from OperatorsManagement.jsx (lines 383-403). Extract into a shared <OperatorSectionTabs/> component to keep the 4 tabs in sync if a 5th area is ever added.
by-service-category endpoint uses `{'_id': '__never__'}` as a sentinel when derived_ids is empty — works but `{'_id': {'$exists': False}}` or omitting the clause entirely is cleaner.

OperatorCategoriesPage save logic in `saveOperator` does an in-place merge that re-runs serializeOperatorTags on every chip click — fine for now but each click triggers a full PUT. If ops have many service_types, consider debouncing (200-500ms).
Categories tab implementation correctly handles operators with no parent service-area (shows italic empty-state) — verified for Carter, Netflix, Laudro, Musango, SpandeX rows in the screenshot.
test_credentials: superadmin@oryno.com / testpassword123 (used); customer@test.com / testpassword123 (used for 403 check)
seed_data_creation: Test mutates Oryno Travel & Hospitality operator's service_types to include 'banquet', 'banquet.catering', 'banquet.photographer'. Restored qualified tag at end of bare-tag test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter211_operator_categories.py covers PUT operator with qualified tags, by-service-category for banquet (with derived + tagged ops), bare-tag fallback, restaurant cuisine_type filter, and 403 for customer. To run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://cinema-management-p0.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_iter211_operator_categories.py -v. Frontend verified via Playwright: tab-categories appears in OperatorsManagement, /admin/operators/categories loads with search/area-filter/operator-rows/panels/area-sections data-testids; chip toggle persists via PUT and survives reload; Edit modal Service Categories section renders panel for banquet area on Oryno and shows italic fallback for cinema/travel-only operators (visible in the page-level Categories tab screenshot which uses the same component).
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. Vite 429 cold-start rate-limit caused one Playwright run to fail; not an app bug, just rerun-on-cooldown behaviour.
